languages.text: "Пожалуй. Когда-то Нунциус сказал мне это при нашей первой встрече. Теперь я говорю это вам на прощание".
"You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."
languages.original_text: "Пожалуй. Когда-то Нунциус сказал мне это при нашей первой встрече. Теперь я говорю это вам на прощание".

traits.locale_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."
"You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."
"You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

languages.text: «En cierto modo. Nuncius me dirigió esas palabras cuando nos conocimos, y ahora yo se las repito a usted como despedida».
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: «En cierto modo. Nuncius me dirigió esas palabras cuando nos conocimos, y ahora yo se las repito a usted como despedida».

languages.text: “也可以这么说。努恩修斯在我们初次见面时，对我说了那句话。今日，我以此言与你道别。”
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: “也可以这么说。努恩修斯在我们初次见面时，对我说了那句话。今日，我以此言与你道别。”

languages.text: « Pour ainsi dire, oui. C'est Nuncius qui les a prononcés lors de notre première rencontre. Et à présent, c'est mon tour de les proférer en guise d'adieu. »
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: « Pour ainsi dire, oui. C'est Nuncius qui les a prononcés lors de notre première rencontre. Et à présent, c'est mon tour de les proférer en guise d'adieu. »

languages.text: "Öyle de denebilir. Nuncius, ilk karşılaştığımızda bana bu sözleri söylemişti. Şimdi veda ederken ben de size söylüyorum."
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle de denebilir. Nuncius, ilk karşılaştığımızda bana bu sözleri söylemişti. Şimdi veda ederken ben de size söylüyorum."

languages.text: 「そう言えるでしょう。ヌンキウスは、我々が初めて出会ったとき、私にその言葉をかけてくれたのです。今、私はそれを、別れの言葉としてあなたに贈ります」
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: 「そう言えるでしょう。ヌンキウスは、我々が初めて出会ったとき、私にその言葉をかけてくれたのです。今、私はそれを、別れの言葉としてあなたに贈ります」

languages.text: "So könnte man es sagen. Das waren Nuncius' Worte bei unserem ersten Treffen. Und nun sage ich sie Euch zum Abschied."
languages.original_text: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."

traits.locale_text: "So könnte man es sagen. Das waren Nuncius' Worte bei unserem ersten Treffen. Und nun sage ich sie Euch zum Abschied."
